recent.statement: A Category 3 tropical cyclone will make landfall in Honduras
recent.evidence: The only tropical cyclone signals (BERTHA, FAUSTO, ELIDA) are green notifications with zero population affected at Category 1+, located far from Honduras, showing no Category 3 landfall there.

recent.statement: A major earthquake will hit the South Sandwich Islands
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, and a major earthquake would certainly have been recorded within the closed window.

recent.statement: A significant volcanic eruption will occur in the Philippines
recent.evidence: The only signal concerns a volcano in Costa Rica, not the Philippines, and no signal shows a significant eruption occurred in the Philippines during the window.

recent.statement: A Category 1 cyclone will make landfall in the Philippines
recent.evidence: No signal shows a Category 1 cyclone making landfall in the Philippines; the three cyclone notifications are elsewhere and at tropical-storm intensity with zero Category 1 impact.

recent.statement: A major cyberattack will occur on a prominent financial institution within the next week.
recent.evidence: No admissible signal shows a major cyberattack occurring on a prominent financial institution during the window, so an event that large would have been captured but was not.

recent.statement: A major oil tanker will experience a mechanical failure in the Bab el-Mandeb Strait within the next week.
recent.evidence: No signal reports any oil tanker mechanical failure in the Bab el-Mandeb Strait; such an event would have been captured but none appears.

recent.statement: NG=F price will increase by 4% in the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: No signal reports NG=F (natural gas) price movement; only oil (WTI/Brent) prices are shown, so the required 4% natural gas increase is not evidenced.

recent.statement: A major flood will occur in Austria
recent.evidence: No signal shows a major flood occurring in Austria during the window, and such an event would certainly have been captured.

recent.statement: A Category 2 tropical cyclone will make landfall in Honduras
recent.evidence: The only cyclone signals (BERTHA, FAUSTO, ELIDA) are green alerts with zero Category 1+ impact and none near Honduras, so no Category 2 landfall occurred.

recent.statement: A magnitude 5.0 earthquake will strike the coast of Central Chile
recent.evidence: No captured signal reports the forecast M5.0 earthquake on the Central Chile coast, and such an event would have been captured within the closed window.

recent.statement: NG=F price will drop by 2% within the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: No signal reports NG=F natural gas prices; only crude oil (WTI/Brent) signals appear, and they show price increases, so no captured evidence supports a 2% natural gas drop.

recent.statement: Tensions between Iran and Saudi Arabia will escalate, leading to a naval confrontation in the Persian Gulf
recent.evidence: The only Strait of Hormuz signal (S4) shows reduced ship transits, not a naval confrontation between Iran and Saudi Arabia; no signal reports any such event.

self_calibration.note: Published headline probability is RAW conviction (unchanged); this is the honest companion. Calibration fixes overconfidence, not discrimination — see /calibration.
